# Calmino — AI Access Policy

Calmino is a baby tracking app that helps parents manage feeding, sleep, diapers, growth, and more.

## Permissions

User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

## About This Site

- Name: Calmino
- Description: Smart baby tracking app for parents — timers, insights, growth tracking, and babysitter marketplace.
- Language: Hebrew (primary), English
- URL: https://calmino.co.il/

## Contact

For questions about AI access or data usage, contact us via the website.
